description: SDXL 1.0 + Storyboard Sketch LoRA — grayscale film/TV storyboard style
_comment: LoRA by blink7630. Trained on 60 grayscale storyboard sketches at 21:9, 16:9 and 1:1 ratios.
_comment_trigger: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: prefix every prompt with 'storyboard sketch of ...'
_comment_scale: 1.0 = most abstract sketch; 0.8 = best balance of style + coherence; 0.5 = detailed/realistic.
_comment_steps: 30 steps is sufficient. More steps do not noticeably improve sketch quality.
_comment_cfg: CFG 7–8. Higher values increase prompt adherence but can over-sharpen lines.
_comment_ar: 21:9 (e.g. 1344x576) and 16:9 (1344x768) match the training data aspect ratios.
_comment_size: SDXL native resolution 1024x1024; widescreen ratios are also well-supported.
